title: Antiviral windows
script_summary: Exploring the science behind antiviral windows and their importance in health.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about antiviral windows than social media does.
Antiviral windows refer to specific time frames when treatment is most effective.
Timing matters! Miss the window, and the virus can spread unchecked.
Studies show that early intervention can dramatically reduce severity.
Understanding these windows can empower you to take action—don’t hesitate.
Want to stay informed? Like, share, and follow for more science insights!
